title: chionochloa conspicua
intro: Chionochloa conspicua is a species of tussock grass native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chionochloa conspicua include its potential to soothe and calm the digestive system, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Chionochloa conspicua often involve infusions or decoctions made from the dried leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or taken as a medicinal tonic.
